config_template.fast_and_approximate_mode: True|False (optional, used in diffusion gating paths)
config_template.activations: optional list of fused unary activations applied to the product

applicability_notes: fusion_notes: Golden applies optional post-activations: apply_activations(input_tensor_a * input_tensor_b, activations). Supports tensor-tensor and tensor-scalar (e.g. attention score scaling by 1/sqrt(head_size), guidance_scale multiply). In-place: output aliases input_tensor_a, so input_tensor_a's memory_config dictates the output placement.

placement_observations.size_descriptor: diffusion transformer gated-MLP hidden_states, refiner down_blocks.1/up_blocks.2
placement_observations.source: call_site comment: 'gate is L1 BS, hidden_states is L1 interleaved; mul_ will output its result in L1 BS' — sharded operand placed first so in-place output stays L1 block-sharded

placement_observations.size_descriptor: diffusion transformer gated-MLP hidden_states, refiner down_blocks.1/up_blocks.2
placement_observations.source: call_site comment in refiner branch of gated activation

memory_config.shard_spec_template: inherits shard spec of first operand (gate)

placement_observations.source: call_site comment: in-place op outputs into first operand's memory config

placement_observations.size_descriptor: full latent tensor (UNet output), scalar multiply by guidance_scale
placement_observations.source: call_site: result subsequently moved with ttnn.to_memory_config(noise_pred, ttnn.L1_MEMORY_CONFIG); guidance chain sub_/mul_/add_ kept in-place to avoid extra allocations

placement_observations.size_descriptor: attention score matrix {B*heads},{seq},{seq}, scalar multiply by 1/sqrt(head_size)

memory_config.layout: as produced by preceding QK matmul (consumed in-place by softmax_in_place)

placement_observations.program_config: followed by softmax_in_place with config.program_configs['softmax_program_config'] — scale kept in-place so sharded scores layout is preserved for sharded softmax
placement_observations.source: call_site: attention score scaling before ttnn.softmax_in_place
